name: SEC EDGAR MCP
description: SEC EDGAR MCP is an open-source MCP server that connects AI models to the rich dataset of SEC EDGAR filings, enabling AI assistants to query official SEC financial data in real-time.

tools.name: get_submissions
tools.description: Fetches submissions (filings) for a given company CIK.

cik.description: Central Index Key of the company

tools.name: get_company_concepts
tools.description: Fetches specific financial concepts for a company.

cik.description: Central Index Key of the company

env.name: SEC_API_USER_AGENT
env.description: User-Agent string required by SEC EDGAR API
